glosses.ja: 袋; アイスのコーン

sentences.target: Ich brauche eine Tüte für das Brot.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊ̯xə ˈaɪ̯nə ˈtyːtə fyːɐ̯ das bʁoːt/

translations.de: Ich brauche eine Tüte für das Brot.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊ̯xə ˈaɪ̯nə ˈtyːtə fyːɐ̯ das bʁoːt/
translations.en: I need a bag for the bread.
translations.es: Necesito una bolsa para el pan.
translations.fr: J’ai besoin d’un sac pour le pain.
translations.it: Mi serve un sacchetto per il pane.
translations.zh-Hans: 我需要一个袋子装面包。
translations.yue: 我要一個袋用嚟裝麵包。
translations.pt: Preciso de um saco para o pão.
translations.tr: Ekmeği koymak için bir poşete ihtiyacım var.
translations.vi: Tôi cần một túi đựng bánh mì.
translations.nl: Ik heb een zak voor het brood nodig.
translations.hu: Szükségem van egy zacskóra a kenyérhez.
translations.hi: मुझे ब्रेड के लिए एक बैग चाहिए.
translations.el: Χρειάζομαι μια σακούλα για το ψωμί.
translations.nb: Jeg trenger en pose til brødet.
translations.sv: Jag behöver en påse till brödet.
translations.ro: Am nevoie de o pungă pentru pâine.
translations.da: Jeg har brug for en pose til brødet.
translations.ja: パンを入れる袋が必要です。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the sentence.
Finite verb, present tense, 1st person singular; transitive verb selecting a direct object.
Indefinite article, feminine accusative; determiner modifying 'Tüte' as the direct object.
Common noun, feminine, accusative; direct object of 'brauche'.
Preposition selecting accusative; introduces a prepositional phrase indicating purpose/recipient.
Definite article, neuter accusative; determiner modifying 'Brot' as the object of 'für'.
Common noun, neuter, accusative; object of the preposition 'für'.

sentences.target: Du hältst die Tüte bitte fest.

translations.de: Du hältst die Tüte bitte fest.
translations.es: Sujeta bien la bolsa, por favor.
translations.fr: Tiens bien le sac, s’il te plaît.
translations.it: Tieni bene il sacchetto, per favore.
translations.pt: Segura bem o saco, por favor.
translations.vi: Làm ơn giữ chặt cái túi.
translations.nl: Hou de zak goed vast, alsjeblieft.
translations.el: Κράτα καλά τη σακούλα, σε παρακαλώ.
translations.nb: Hold posen godt fast, vær så snill.
translations.da: Hold godt fast i posen, tak.
translations.ja: 袋をしっかり持ってください。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular nominative; subject of the sentence.
Finite verb, present tense, 2nd person singular; part of the separable verb 'festhalten', taking 'die Tüte' as its object.
Definite article, feminine accusative; determiner modifying 'Tüte' as the direct object.
Common noun, feminine, accusative; direct object of 'hältst'.
Politeness adverb; modifies the clause, requesting the action politely.
Separable verbal particle; complements 'hältst' to form 'festhalten' (to hold tight).

sentences.target: In der Tüte sind noch zwei Äpfel.
sentences.reading: /ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈtyːtə zɪnt nɔx t͡svaɪ̯ ˈɛpfl̩/

translations.de: In der Tüte sind noch zwei Äpfel.
translations.ipa: /ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈtyːtə zɪnt nɔx t͡svaɪ̯ ˈɛpfl̩/
translations.en: There are still two apples in the bag.
translations.es: Todavía hay dos manzanas en la bolsa.
translations.fr: Il reste deux pommes dans le sac.
translations.it: Nel sacchetto ci sono ancora due mele.
translations.ko: 봉투 안에 아직 사과 두 개가 있어요.
translations.pt: Ainda há duas maçãs no saco.
translations.tr: Poşetin içinde hâlâ iki elma var.
translations.vi: Trong túi vẫn còn hai quả táo.
translations.nl: Er zitten nog twee appels in de zak.
translations.hu: A zacskóban még van két alma.
translations.hi: बैग में अभी भी दो सेब हैं.
translations.pl: W torbie są jeszcze dwa jabłka.
translations.el: Στη σακούλα υπάρχουν ακόμα δύο μήλα.
translations.nb: Det er fortsatt to epler i posen.
translations.id: Di dalam kantong masih ada dua apel.
translations.sv: Det finns fortfarande två äpplen i påsen.
translations.ro: În pungă mai sunt două mere.
translations.cs: V sáčku jsou ještě dvě jablka.
translations.da: Der er stadig to æbler i posen.
translations.ja: 袋の中にまだリンゴが二つあります。

tokens.explanation: Preposition selecting dative for static location; introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, feminine dative; determiner modifying 'Tüte' as object of 'In'.
Common noun, feminine, dative; object of the preposition 'In' indicating location.
Finite verb, present tense, 3rd person plural; main verb linking the subject to the locative phrase.
Adverb indicating continuation; modifies the clause meaning 'still'.
Cardinal numeral; quantifies 'Äpfel'.
Common noun, plural nominative; grammatical subject of 'sind'.

sentences.target: Sie packt die Tüte ins Auto.

translations.de: Sie packt die Tüte ins Auto.
translations.en: She puts the bag in the car.
translations.es: Ella mete la bolsa en el coche.
translations.fr: Elle met le sac dans la voiture.
translations.it: Lei mette il sacchetto in macchina.
translations.pt: Ela coloca o saco no carro.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đặt cái túi vào trong xe.
translations.nl: Ze legt de zak in de auto.
translations.hi: वह बैग कार में रखती है.
translations.id: Dia memasukkan kantong ke dalam mobil.
translations.ja: 彼女は袋を車に入れます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of the sentence.
Finite verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; transitive verb selecting 'die Tüte' as direct object.
Definite article, feminine accusative; determiner modifying 'Tüte' as the direct object.
Common noun, feminine, accusative; direct object of 'packt'.
Contraction of 'in das' (preposition + definite article); marks motion toward a goal, selecting accusative; introduces the prepositional phrase.
Common noun, neuter, accusative; object of the preposition 'ins'.
